_comment: Official hosted MCP — https://github.com/cloudflare/mcp — install: bash scripts/cf-mcp-setup.sh
_api_token: If OAuth fails or token is account-scoped (cfat_): bash scripts/cf-mcp-setup.sh --api-token
_optional_bridges: bash scripts/cf-mcp-setup.sh --with-bridges (bindings/builds/observability/ai-gateway; slow in Cursor). Prefer cloudflare-api search+execute.
